title: dacryodes steyermarkii
intro: Dacryodes steyermarkii, also known as the Steyermark's Canella, is a plant species belonging to the family Burseraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The leaves and bark of Dacryodes steyermarkii are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for reducing inflammation and promoting overall health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms associated with colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
